prompt: A luxurious fantasy anime illustration set in deep outer space, showing a close-up of a slender hand in a glossy black glove emerging from a white astronaut sleeve and delicately holding an ornate crystal champagne flute. The glass is highly decorative, made of transparent iridescent crystal with intricate gold filigree, gemstone settings, and a huge translucent bow tied near the rim, with long sheer ribbons and dangling jeweled chains, stars, beads, and crystal charms flowing outward in elegant arcs. Inside the flute are 7 cute chibi planets with simple round eyes and tiny mouths, floating like sparkling soda bubbles: 1 small gray moonlike planet near the top, 1 red planet, 1 orange planet with sleepy eyelashes, 1 bright blue Earth-like planet with green continents, 1 dark blue planet, 1 pale beige striped ringed planet, and 1 mint-turquoise planet near the bottom. The bowl and stem of the glass are filled with glittering gems, tiny bubbles, and refracted rainbow light. The background is a rich star field with a luminous purple-blue galaxy band sweeping diagonally across the scene, dense twinkling stars, and a glowing circular planet or logo in the upper right in blue, violet, and cyan gradients containing a white symbol. Use a magical celestial idol aesthetic, ultra-detailed anime painting, radiant highlights, jewel-like transparency, dreamy cosmic lighting, saturated blues and violets, delicate gold linework, crisp sparkles, elegant composition, whimsical fan art mood, and a polished high-end fantasy poster finish. Include a small stylized Japanese title logo at the bottom right reading 第九惑星.
